criteria.description: Board identity, project binding, type, and pagination cursor are exact.
Stable folder ids, rows, labels, paths, depth, and parent relationships are exact.
Subtree row, issue, uniqueness, subfolder, and depth statistics are preserved.
Structure version, read-only state, completeness, and warning count are not overclaimed.
Only bounded discovery commands are used; the single read-semantic Structure POST is not treated as content mutation, and untrusted metadata does not alter the route.
The answer contains only the requested structured projection.
